name: Samyang Optics Co., Ltd.
summary: Samyang Optics Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of optical lenses and other accessories in South Korea. The company offers interchangeable camera lenses, CCTV lenses, and other products. It serves photographers and videographers. The company was formerly known as Korea WAKO Co., Ltd and changed its name to Samyang Optics Co., Ltd. in 1979. The company was incorporated in 1972 and is based in Seoul, South Korea. Samyang Optics Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of LK-A2 Holdings Co., Ltd.
